---
description: 'These instructions apply to all files in the project and should be followed by all developers working on the application.'
applyTo: '**/*'
---

# Documentation Instructions

If you create or update any configuration files, application code, or other project files, please also update the documentation in the `docs/` directory as needed. This ensures that the documentation remains accurate and helpful for all users and contributors. If documentation does not exist for the feature or change you are working on, please create it. If it does exist, please update it to reflect any changes you have made. Clear and up-to-date documentation is essential for the success of the project and helps others understand how to use and contribute to the application effectively. If you should come across any outdated, missing or incorrect documentation, then you must update it.
